docs.title: Home
docs.text: Find your desired TEST CASES, review their detailed operations, and select the ones you need. Explore our extensive library to find and export the perfect test cases for your project.

docs.title: 🛒 Test Case Cart
docs.text:

docs.title: TCP DL CC LTE (nCA)
docs.text:
Back to List

Test Case Accuver XCAL-ART Test case ID Description Tech classification Functional areas classification SNGL-001-07 TCP DL CC LTE (nCA) LTE Throughput

docs.title: Test Procedure
docs.text:
1. Data download measurement using Autocall FTP, Iperf, etc.
  2. The download session is not disconnected during the set traffic time, and the average throughput of the traffic time is higher than the set threshold.

docs.title: • Autocall Scenario
docs.text: Using 1 UE Call Type - App > Iperf Mode - TCP Direction - Down(iperf2 server), Down(iperf3 -R option)

docs.title: • AIS Scenario
docs.text: Using 1 Cell Cell center Fixed point

docs.title: Test Pass/Fail Criteria
docs.text: • Measured LTE PDSCH TOTAL throughput higher than the threshold. (Default - Pass: 441Mbps, C.Pass: 353Mbps)

docs.title: TCP DL CC NSA nCC LTE + NR
docs.text:

Test Case Accuver XCAL-ART Test case ID Description Tech classification Functional areas classification SNGL-001-24 TCP DL CC NSA nCC LTE + NR NSA Throughput

docs.title: Test Procedure
docs.text:
1. Data download measurement using Autocall FTP, Iperf, etc.
  2. The download session is not disconnected during the set traffic time, and the average throughput of the traffic time is higher than the set threshold.

docs.title: • Autocall Scenario
docs.text: Using 1 UE Call Type - App > Iperf Mode - TCP Direction - Down(iperf2 server), Down(iperf3 -R option)

docs.title: • AIS Scenario
docs.text: Using 1 Cell Cell center Fixed point

docs.title: Test Pass/Fail Criteria
docs.text: •  Measured ENDC PDSCH throughput higher than the threshold. (Default - Pass: 360Mbps, C.Pass: 288Mbps)
